scripts.build:bin:
npm run bundle && printf '#!/bin/sh
DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0")")" && pwd)"
exec node "$DIR/opencode-observer.js" "$@"
' > ../../bin/opencode-observer && chmod +x ../../bin/opencode-observer && echo '{"type":"module"}' > ../../bin/package.json
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:bin
